fields.name: videoUrl
fields.label: YouTube Video URL
fields.description: Embeds a video at the top of the post

fields.name: slug
fields.label: URL Slug
fields.description: The page URL path. Example: 'my-post' → theudaf.com/my-post. Leave empty to use filename.

fields.name: videoUrl

fields.description: Embeds a video at the top of the event page

fields.name: slug
fields.label: URL Slug
fields.description: The page URL path. Example: 'iftar-2025' → theudaf.com/events/iftar-2025. Do NOT include /events/ prefix. Leave empty to use filename.

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
